tasks.label: Start Backend API
tasks.command: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; cd packages/api && source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8080

tasks.label: Launch Android Emulator
tasks.command: ADB=${env:HOME}/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb; EMU=${env:HOME}/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator; AVD_NAME=Pixel_5_API_30_Lite; if $ADB devices | grep -q 'emulator-'; then DEVICE=$($ADB devices | grep 'emulator-' | head -n1 | awk '{print $1}'); else DEVICE='emulator-5554'; fi; if [ "$($ADB -s $DEVICE get-state 2>/dev/null || true)" = "device" ]; then while [ "$($ADB -s $DEVICE shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null || true)" != "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo "Emulator ready"; exit 0; fi; echo "Starting emulator ($AVD_NAME)..."; $EMU -avd $AVD_NAME -no-audio -no-boot-anim -gpu software -no-snapshot-load & $ADB -e wait-for-device; while [ "$($ADB -e shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null)" != "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo 'Emulator ready'; wait
